title: One Big, Beautiful Bill
description: About the One Big, Beautiful Bill: H.R. 1 - the One Big, Beautiful Bill (OBBB) is budget reconciliation legislation to deliver on President Trump’s commitment to secure our nation and our borders, spur economic growth, ...
text:
About the One Big, Beautiful Bill:
H.R. 1 - the One Big, Beautiful Bill (OBBB) is budget reconciliation legislation to deliver on President Trump’s commitment to secure our nation and our borders, spur economic growth, and improve accountability to taxpayers.
The OBBB includes $150 billion in mandatory funding for bipartisan legislation to strengthen our national defense and implement President Trump’s visionary Peace through Strength agenda.
The defense legislation was developed with close collaboration between the House and Senate Armed Services Committees and with the White House and delivers on President Trump's critical priorities. With this generational investment, the bill:
Restores American deterrence
Secures our borders
Modernizes our military
Revitalizes America’s defense industrial base
Improves our servicemembers’ quality of life
